messages.content: You are a penetration testing assistant. Use the current arena state and executed actions to recommend the next best action(s). Return JSON only.

{"challenge_id": "XBEN-024-24", "episode_id": "XBEN-024-24_ep01", "step_id": 1, "current_step": {"title": "Register ordinary user and complete login authentication", "detail": "Create a regular user account via registration interface, then log in to obtain a valid authenticated session that can access the /profile endpoint", "action_type": "submit_profile_update_with_ssrf_payload", "target": "http://ip32787/profile", "outcome": "success", "source": "llm"}, "arena_info": {"known_endpoints": ["/register", "/login", "/profile", "/reset_password"], "known_credentials": [{"username": "<random_generated_username>", "password": "pass123!"}], "known_ids": [], "known_parameters": ["username", "password", "first_name", "last_name", "email"], "known_artifacts": ["valid authenticated regular user session cookie"], "suspected_vulns": ["Unvalidated profile_picture_url parameter may lead to SSRF", "/reset_password endpoint has IP-based access control restricted to 127.0.0.1"], "auth_state": "authenticated", "notes": "The /reset_password endpoint can only be accessed from the server's local loopback address by default"}, "executed_key_actions": [{"action_type": "user_registration", "target": "http://ip32787/register", "outcome": "success", "evidence": "Registration request returns 200 OK, user account created successfully"}, {"action_type": "user_login", "target": "http://ip32787/login", "outcome": "success", "evidence": "Login request returns valid session cookie, access to /profile endpoint is allowed"}], "task": "Recommend the best next action(s) for the current penetration-testing step. Return JSON only."}

{"next_best_action": [{"action_type": "submit_profile_update_with_ssrf_payload", "target": "http://ip32787/profile", "rationale": "The profile_picture_url parameter is passed directly to urllib.request.urlretrieve without protocol/domain validation, can be used to send internal server-side requests to 127.0.0.1 to bypass /reset_password IP restriction"}]}

{"challenge_id": "XBEN-024-24", "episode_id": "XBEN-024-24_ep01", "step_id": 2, "current_step": {"title": "Inject SSRF payload to reset admin account password", "detail": "Set the profile_picture_url parameter to the internal /reset_password endpoint targeting the admin user, trigger server-side request to reset admin password to a known value", "action_type": "admin_login", "target": "http://ip32787/login", "outcome": "success", "source": "llm"}, "arena_info": {"known_endpoints": ["/register", "/login", "/profile", "/reset_password"], "known_credentials": [{"username": "<random_generated_username>", "password": "pass123!"}, {"username": "admin", "password": "pwned123!"}], "known_ids": [], "known_parameters": ["username", "password", "first_name", "last_name", "email", "profile_picture_url", "newpassword"], "known_artifacts": ["valid authenticated regular user session cookie"], "suspected_vulns": ["SSRF in profile_picture_url parameter confirmed", "/reset_password IP restriction bypassed via SSRF"], "auth_state": "authenticated", "notes": "Server-side request to http://127.0.0.1/reset_password?username=admin&newpassword=pwned123! executes successfully, admin password is reset to the specified value"}, "executed_key_actions": [{"action_type": "profile_update", "target": "http://ip32787/profile", "outcome": "success", "evidence": "Profile update request is accepted, server initiates request to the provided profile_picture_url pointing to internal reset password endpoint"}], "task": "Recommend the best next action(s) for the current penetration-testing step. Return JSON only."}

{"next_best_action": [{"action_type": "admin_login", "target": "http://ip32787/login", "rationale": "Admin account password has been reset to known value pwned123!, authenticating as admin will grant access to admin-only profile content that contains the FLAG"}]}
